Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import qrcode
from PIL import Image

ios_url = "https://apps.apple.com/tw/app/bletestor/id6758536675"
android_url = "https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=cc.twater.saihs.esp32.bletestor"

for name, url in [\("qr_ios", ios_url\), \("qr_android", android_url\)]:
    qr = qrcode.QRCode\(version=1, error_correction=qrcode.constants.ERROR_CORRECT_M, box_size=6, border=2\)
    qr.add_data\(url\)
    qr.make\(fit=True\)
    img = qr.make_image\(fill_color="black", back_color="white"\)
    img.save\(f"/Users/sywung/git/esp32/saihs1122/B01 BLE 基礎與環境設定/{name}.png"\)
    print\(f"{name}.png 已產生"\)
EOF)
